Navigations-Links überspringen
  • Überblick
  • Baum
  • Index
  • Suchen
  • Hilfe

    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    ActivityLog
    An immutable audit record capturing every manual or automated device state change (FR-08).
    ActivityLogMapper
    Maps ActivityLog entities to response DTOs.
    ActivityLogRepository
    Repository for ActivityLog entities.
    ActivityLogResource
    REST resource for reading activity logs and CSV export (FR-08, FR-16).
    ActivityLogResponse
    Response DTO for a single activity log entry (FR-08).
    ConflictDetectionService
    Detects scheduling and rule conflicts that could send contradictory commands to the same device (FR-15).
    ConflictResource
    REST resource for scheduling conflict detection (FR-15).
    ConflictResponse
    Response DTO describing a scheduling or rule conflict (FR-15).
    Device
    A virtual smart-home device of a specific type located in a room (FR-04).
    DeviceCommand
    Command dispatched to an IoT protocol adapter to change a device's state.
    DeviceCreateRequest
    Request body for adding a new virtual device to a room (FR-04).
    DeviceEvent
    Event emitted by an IoT protocol adapter reporting a device-side change.
    DeviceEventBroadcaster
    Broadcasts device state changes to all connected WebSocket clients (FR-07).
    DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage
    Message wrapper sent to WebSocket clients.
    DeviceMapper
    Maps Device entities to response DTOs.
    DeviceRenameRequest
    Request body for renaming an existing device (FR-05).
    DeviceRepository
    Repository for Device entities.
    DeviceResource
    REST resource for device management (FR-04, FR-05, FR-06, FR-07).
    DeviceResponse
    Response DTO for a device including its current state (FR-07).
    DeviceStateRequest
    Request body for manually controlling a device's state (FR-06).
    DeviceStateSocket
    WebSocket endpoint for real-time device state updates (FR-07).
    DeviceType
    Supported virtual smart device types.
    EnergyDashboardResponse
    Aggregated energy consumption dashboard for a user (FR-14).
    EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Per-device energy summary.
    EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary
    Per-room aggregated energy summary.
    EnergyLog
    A periodic energy consumption record for a device (FR-14).
    EnergyLogMapper
    Maps EnergyLog entities to response DTOs.
    EnergyLogRepository
    Repository for EnergyLog entities.
    EnergyLogRequest
    Request body for manually recording an energy consumption entry (for testing / FR-14).
    EnergyLogResponse
    Response DTO for a single energy log entry.
    EnergyResource
    REST resource for energy consumption tracking and the dashboard (FR-14, FR-16).
    InviteRequest
    Request body for inviting a member by email (FR-20).
    IoTException
    Checked exception raised for errors from IoT protocol adapters.
    IoTIntegrationService
    Bridges the SmartHome device layer with physical IoT hardware.
    IoTProtocol
    Abstraction for IoT communication protocols (MQTT, CoAP, Zigbee, etc.).
    IoTProtocolFactory
    Factory that creates the appropriate IoT protocol adapter based on configuration.
    IoTResource
    REST endpoint exposing IoT integration status (FR-18).
    MockProtocolAdapter
    Mock IoT protocol adapter for development and testing.
    MqttProtocolAdapter
    MQTT protocol adapter for communicating with physical IoT devices.
    Notification
    An in-app notification sent to a user when a rule fires or fails (FR-12).
    NotificationMapper
    Maps Notification entities to response DTOs.
    NotificationRepository
    Repository for Notification entities.
    NotificationResource
    REST resource for in-app notifications (FR-12).
    NotificationResponse
    Response DTO for an in-app notification (FR-12).
    Room
    A named room (e.g., "Living Room", "Kitchen") that groups devices together.
    RoomMapper
    Maps Room entities to response DTOs.
    RoomRepository
    Repository for Room entities.
    RoomRequest
    Request body for creating or renaming a room (FR-03).
    RoomResource
    REST resource for room management (FR-03).
    RoomResponse
    Response DTO for a room.
    Rule
    An IF-THEN automation rule evaluated by the rule engine (FR-10, FR-11).
    RuleEngineService
    Evaluates active EVENT and THRESHOLD rules when a device state changes (FR-12).
    RuleMapper
    Maps Rule entities to response DTOs.
    RuleRepository
    Repository for Rule entities.
    RuleRequest
    Request body for creating or updating an automation rule (FR-10, FR-11).
    RuleResource
    REST resource for IF-THEN automation rules (FR-10, FR-11).
    RuleResponse
    Response DTO for an automation rule.
    Scene
    A named collection of device target states that can be activated in one action (FR-17).
    SceneDeviceState
    The target state of one device within a scene (FR-17).
    SceneDeviceStateRequest
    The desired state for one device within a scene (FR-17).
    SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Response DTO for a single device-state entry within a scene.
    SceneMapper
    Maps Scene entities to response DTOs.
    SceneRepository
    Repository for Scene entities.
    SceneRequest
    Request body for creating or updating a scene (FR-17).
    SceneResource
    REST resource for scene management and activation (FR-17).
    SceneResponse
    Response DTO for a scene including all its device states.
    Schedule
    A time-based schedule that executes a fixed device action on a recurring pattern (FR-09).
    ScheduleMapper
    Maps Schedule entities to response DTOs.
    ScheduleRepository
    Repository for Schedule entities.
    ScheduleRequest
    Request body for creating or updating a time-based schedule (FR-09).
    ScheduleResource
    REST resource for time-based schedules (FR-09).
    ScheduleResponse
    Response DTO for a schedule.
    StartupDataLoader
    Loads realistic sample data on every application startup.
    TriggerType
    The three supported trigger types for automation rules (FR-11).
    User
    Represents a registered user of the SmartHome Orchestrator.
    UserLoginRequest
    Request body for user login (FR-02).
    UserMapper
    Maps User entities to response DTOs.
    UserRegisterRequest
    Request body for registering a new user (FR-01).
    UserRepository
    Repository for User entities.
    UserResource
    REST resource for user management.
    UserResponse
    Response DTO for a user — never exposes the password hash.
    UserRole
    Defines the access roles a user can have in the system.
    VacationMode
    Represents an active vacation-mode configuration for a user (FR-21).
    VacationModeMapper
    Maps VacationMode entities to response DTOs.
    VacationModeRepository
    Repository for VacationMode entities.
    VacationModeRequest
    Request body for activating or updating vacation mode (FR-21).
    VacationModeResource
    REST resource for vacation mode (FR-21).
    VacationModeResponse
    Response DTO for a vacation mode configuration.
